title: Laughter and Lyrics: Hasya Kavi Sammelan at Marwadi University
description: Celebrating cultural expression and creative performance at Marwadi University. The Hasya Kavi Sammelan served as a brilliant platform for contemporary comic verse, blending rhythmic poetry with modern stand-up timing. A look back at a memorable night filled with high-spirited performances, literary flair, and outstanding audience engagement.
